cb859448-cbea-4a49-8325-6b0a89d8b100.title: API Contract
cb859448-cbea-4a49-8325-6b0a89d8b100.body: Action-based HTTP API for @luminous/server. Endpoints map 1:1 to concept actions. POST /api/{concept}/{action} pattern.

c8e14dcb-74d8-46f6-bb69-c6a2297321c8.title: Workspace
c8e14dcb-74d8-46f6-bb69-c6a2297321c8.body: GET /api/documents → list all canvases\nGET /api/document/:path → load full document\nGET /api/health → server status

1b2174c1-0939-4106-82bf-33f145a0c599.title: Note
1b2174c1-0939-4106-82bf-33f145a0c599.body:
POST /api/note/create { path, title, body? } → { ok, id }\nPOST /api/note/update { path, id, title?, body? } → { ok }\nPOST /api/note/delete { path, id } → { ok }

2804fdf2-d91f-4561-a75d-5457814a67bc.title: Edge
2804fdf2-d91f-4561-a75d-5457814a67bc.body: POST /api/edge/connect { path, fromId, toId, label? } → { ok, id }\nPOST /api/edge/disconnect { path, id } → { ok }\nPOST /api/edge/relabel { path, id, label } → { ok }

55803589-90fd-4d72-ba6d-367d59df68d4.title: Nesting
55803589-90fd-4d72-ba6d-367d59df68d4.body:
POST /api/nest { path, parentId, childId } → { ok }\nPOST /api/unnest { path, childId } → { ok }\n\nTop-level — synchronizes Note and Canvas concepts.   dfdfdffdfdfdfdfdfdffdfdfdfdfdfdf

9b4027c4-0c59-4da7-9702-15637473e162.title: Canvas (Position)
9b4027c4-0c59-4da7-9702-15637473e162.body: POST /api/node/move { path, id, x, y } → { ok }\nPOST /api/node/resize { path, id, w, h } → { ok }

3228a21d-1911-4d04-99db-518eb1652536.title: Watch (WebSocket)
3228a21d-1911-4d04-99db-518eb1652536.body: WS /ws/watch\n\nMessages: { event: "changed", path } when backing file changes on disk.

52b5c76a-19c2-4880-a9f5-6e7dc61ad750.title: Response Envelope

47471467-bc7b-4dee-a07c-60ab178f9f73.title: Future: Schema
47471467-bc7b-4dee-a07c-60ab178f9f73.body: POST /api/schema/define { name, fields } → { ok }\nPOST /api/schema/edit { name, fields } → { ok }\nPOST /api/schema/delete { name } → { ok }
